title: Transgender empowerment and job placement
description: Empowering the transgender community through job placement in companies like Ola, Uber, and Rapido, and by providing entrepreneurial resources.

sections.title: Job Placement Success
sections.content: Successfully placed over 150 transgender individuals in stable employment with major ride-sharing and delivery companies.

sections.title: Skill Development
sections.content: Providing comprehensive training programs in customer service, vehicle maintenance, and financial literacy.

sections.title: Entrepreneurial Support
sections.content: Offering micro-loans and business mentorship to help community members start their own ventures.
